headline: 4 Industrial Manufacturing Stocks to Gain on Robust Industry Trends
summary: Increase in manufacturing activities, technological progress and strategic acquisitions favor the Zacks Manufacturing - General Industrial industry's near-term prospects. PH, NDSN, CR & FLS are some promising stocks in the industry.
